sections.title: If the player is not disguised

lines.speaker: Lady Nadezhda Shadum
lines.text: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!

lines.speaker: Lady Nadezhda Shadum
lines.text: Who are you? Why are you in my home?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm [Vampyre name]. I was just looking around.

lines.speaker: Lady Nadezhda Shadum
lines.text: You half-breeds are becoming too arrogant for your own good. If you're not careful, someone might call for a good culling. Now get out of my house!
